input.title: Treasury 10-year auction sees soft demand; yields tick higher
input.content: The latest US 10-year Treasury auction cleared with a higher-than-expected yield and a softer bid-to-cover ratio. Rates desks described demand as lukewarm. No single equity issuer was highlighted.

mockModelResponse.headline: Soft 10-year Treasury auction lifts yields
mockModelResponse.summary: A weak bid-to-cover in the 10-year auction pushed yields higher. The piece is rates-focused without naming equity tickers.

meta.notes: Rates/bond market event without equity tickers.
